description1.language: Located in the heart of Hollywood, The Dixie Hollywood is steps from Hollywood Boulevard and a short distance from attractions like the Hollywood Walk of Fame and Universal Studios Hollywood. The hotel offers an outdoor pool, complimentary Wi-Fi, and concierge services. The air-conditioned rooms feature a refrigerator, microwave, and flat-screen TV with cable. Bathrooms include complimentary toiletries and a hair dryer. Daily housekeeping is provided. Additional amenities include express check-in/check-out, a 24-hour front desk, and an onsite ATM. Self-parking is available (subject to charges). The hotel also offers a tour desk, ticket service, and car rentals. Smoking is prohibited in the hotel; designated smoking areas are available. Vending machines provide snacks and beverages.

description2.language: The Dixie Hollywood is a hotel.

description1.language: This Art Deco hotel near Los Angeles International Airport offers 185+ guestrooms featuring refrigerators, LCD televisions, pillowtop beds with down comforters and premium bedding, and complimentary wired and wireless internet access. Private bathrooms include complimentary toiletries and hair dryers. Guests can enjoy American cuisine at the on-site café, which features a bar/lounge, or utilize room service (during limited hours). Cooked-to-order breakfasts are available daily for a fee. The hotel features a fitness center, a television in a common area, a business center, express check-out, and meeting rooms. A complimentary 24-hour roundtrip airport shuttle is provided. Other amenities include bicycles to rent, complimentary use of a nearby fitness facility, and a vending machine.

description1.language: The Best Western Plus LA Mid Town Hotel is centrally located in Los Angeles, in the Mid-Wilshire district, near public transportation. It is close to L.A. LIVE, Microsoft Theater, Los Angeles Convention Center, Crypto.com Arena, and Hollywood Boulevard. The 90 guestrooms feature flat-screen cable TVs, free Wi-Fi, seating areas, work desks, refrigerators, microwaves, pillowtop beds with Egyptian cotton sheets, private bathrooms with complimentary toiletries and hair dryers, and coffee machines. Guests can enjoy a complimentary continental breakfast served daily, a fitness center, a 24-hour reception, a 24-hour business center, express check-out, and dry cleaning/laundry services. The hotel also offers a banquet hall, conference center, meeting room, and self-parking (subject to charges).

description1.language: Residence Inn Los Angeles L.A. LIVE offers 219 guestrooms, each featuring a kitchen with a full-sized refrigerator/freezer and oven, a down comforter, and a double sofa bed. Guests can enjoy complimentary wireless internet access and a 32-inch flat-screen television with cable programming. Conveniences include a laptop-compatible safe, a desk, and a phone with free local calls. The hotel features an outdoor pool, a 24-hour fitness center, wedding services, and a banquet hall. Dining options include Table 901, a snack bar/deli, and a bar/lounge. A complimentary continental breakfast is served daily. Additional amenities include a business center, complimentary newspapers in the lobby, and dry cleaning/laundry services. Event facilities consist of conference space and 10 meeting rooms. Centrally located in Los Angeles, the hotel is steps from Peacock Theater and a 5-minute walk from Crypto.com Arena and the Los Angeles Convention Center. The preferred airport is Los Angeles Intl. (LAX), located 27.7 km / 17.2 mi away.

description1.language: Crenshaw Inn Motel offers 16 guestrooms featuring refrigerators, microwaves, and cable TV. Guests can enjoy complimentary Wi-Fi, room service, and tour/ticket assistance. The hotel provides a 24-hour front desk, express check-in, luggage storage, and laundry facilities. Airport transfers are available for a surcharge (24 hours), and limited onsite parking is provided. Private bathrooms include shower/tub combinations, complimentary toiletries, and hair dryers. Desks and daily housekeeping are provided, and irons/ironing boards are available upon request. Nearby attractions include Kia Forum (2.5 mi) and SoFi Stadium (2.6 mi). BMO Stadium is 4.4 mi away, and the University of Southern California is 4.6 mi away. The preferred airport is Los Angeles Intl. (LAX), 9 mi away.

Dining options include an on-site restaurant serving Korean cuisine with room service, a bar café, and daily breakfast. Self-parking is available for a fee. Live, and University of Southern California are nearby.

description1.language: Located in Los Angeles on Wilshire Boulevard, Beverly Hills Plaza Hotel &amp; Spa offers air-conditioned rooms with refrigerators and Smart TVs. Rooms feature pillowtop beds with premium bedding, complimentary wireless internet, cable programming, and private bathrooms with complimentary toiletries and hair dryers. The hotel features a restaurant with a bar/lounge, Le Petit Cafe and Bar, offering room service during limited hours. Guests can enjoy an outdoor pool, spa tub, and fitness center, as well as a spa offering body treatments and facials. Additional amenities include concierge services, gift shops/newsstands, a 24-hour business center, and a 24-hour front desk. Self-parking is available for a surcharge. The hotel also offers dry cleaning/laundry services. Complimentary internet access is available. The hotel is a smoke-free property. The property will be renovating from April 1 2025 to June 24 2025 (completion date subject to change). The following areas are affected: Hallway. Renovation work will only be conducted during business hours on weekdays. Every effort will be made to minimize noise and disturbance.

description1.language: The Tilt Hotel Universal Hollywood Hotel is centrally located in Los Angeles, offering convenient access to Universal Studios Hollywood and the Hollywood Bowl. Guests can enjoy amenities such as free WiFi, complimentary coffee, and guest laundry facilities. The hotel features an indoor heated pool, a 24-hour front desk, a snack bar/deli, and a business center. Guestrooms include a flat-screen TV with cable programming, a desk, a hairdryer, and a private bathroom. Self-parking is available for a surcharge. The hotel is near Universal CityWalk, Runyon Canyon Park, and Hollywood Burbank Airport.

description2.language: The Tilt Hotel Universal Hollywood Hotel is a Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are easily accessible by taxi or bus from the hotel.

description1.language:
Stay in the center of all the action at our Comfort Inn® Near Los Angeles. Our hotel is just minutes from dozens of famous and fun Hollywood attractions on the Sunset Strip with proximity to several major freeways and Union Station. Plus, we offer convenient amenities for a great night's rest and a great start to the day.

You’ll find there’s never a shortage of things to do in the area. Catch a game at nearby Dodger Stadium or stroll through MacArthur Park, historic Chinatown or the Old Los Angeles Zoo in Griffith Park. See celebrities at the Hollywood Wax Museum or sightsee along the Hollywood Walk of Fame near Grauman’s Chinese Theater.

Don’t feel like driving everywhere? Take a bus to Union Station, just 10 minutes away. The Los Angeles METRO can take you to attractions like the Los Angeles Convention Center, The Grove, Crypto.com Arena, Hollywood Bowl, Rose Bowl Stadium, Universal City and more.

Back at the hotel, you'll get to enjoy amenities like free WiFi throughout the hotel, free indoor parking and more. Our friendly staff will make sure you have everything you need for a great stay at our Los Angeles hotel near Hollywood.

Our Los Angeles hotel offers the amenities you need to feel refreshed and ready to take on the day. Connect to free WiFi to share your L.A. experiences with friends and family. Our hotel also offers an onsite restaurant. Driving? Take advantage of our free garage parking.

When visiting a busy city like Los Angeles, you’ll want to be in the heart of the action. Our convenient location on Sunset Blvd means you’re close to some of the best shopping, dining, and entertainment the city has to offer. Hollywood, Beverly Hills, Little Tokyo and Downtown Los Angeles are all just minutes from our hotel. We’re also close to popular attractions like the Hollywood Walk of Fame, Universal Studios, Crypto.com Arena and Dodger Stadium.

description1.language:
Hollywood City Inn is located in the heart of Hollywood, Los Angeles, surrounded by restaurants. It is just a 3-minute walk from Hollywood Boulevard and within a 5-minute drive of the Hollywood Walk of Fame. Griffith Park Observatory is also a short walk away.

The hotel features 44 individually furnished guestrooms, each equipped with a refrigerator, microwave, plasma TV with satellite programming, shower/tub combination, hair dryer, and iron/ironing board. Daily housekeeping is provided.

Guests can enjoy a seasonal outdoor pool, terrace, and garden. Complimentary Wi-Fi is available throughout the property. Other amenities include a 24-hour front desk, luggage storage, laundry facilities, and free self-parking. Room service is available during limited hours, and 24-hour vending machines offer snacks and beverages. Tour/ticket assistance and airport transportation (for an additional fee) are also offered. The hotel is a non-smoking property with designated smoking zones.

description1.language: Americas Best Value Inn Hollywood is centrally located in Los Angeles, just off Highway 101. It offers an outdoor pool, complimentary wireless internet access, and free self-parking. The hotel features a 24-hour front desk, multilingual staff, and concierge services. Each of the 38 guestrooms includes a pillowtop bed with premium bedding, a cable TV with HBO film channels, ironing facilities, an alarm clock, and a private bathroom with complimentary toiletries and a hair dryer. Hollywood Boulevard and the Hollywood Walk of Fame are within a 5-minute drive. The Hollywood Bowl is approximately 3 miles away. Complimentary newspapers are available in the lobby, and fax and photocopying services are offered.

Amenities include concierge services, a picnic area, a vending machine, a computer station, and express check-in/check-out. The property offers 52 individually decorated guestrooms, each with a refrigerator, flat-screen television, iPod docking station, and a pillowtop bed with Frette Italian sheets. Private bathrooms include rainfall showers and toiletries. Complimentary Wi-Fi and on-site parking are available. Nearby attractions include the Beverly Center and Melrose Avenue.

description1.language: Hollywood Stars Inn, located in Los Angeles (Hollywood), offers 25 air-conditioned guest rooms featuring complimentary Wi-Fi, flat-screen televisions with cable programming, refrigerators, and private bathrooms with shower/tub combinations, complimentary toiletries, and hair dryers. Irons/ironing boards are available upon request, and daily housekeeping is provided. The hotel features a 24-hour front desk, vending machines, and room service. Free parking is available. The property is wheelchair accessible and adapted for easy access. Smoking is restricted to designated areas. A deposit of $150 is required at check-in and is refundable after room inspection. A late checkout fee of $25 per hour applies. Smoking in a non-smoking room incurs a $250 fee plus a $100 cleaning fee. The hotel is located near Hollywood Boulevard, Hollywood Walk of Fame, and TCL Chinese Theatre. Hollywood Burbank Airport (BUR) is the preferred airport. Please note that early check-in is not available.

Live, Crypto.com Arena, and the Los Angeles Convention Center. It features a full-service spa with massages, body treatments, and facials, as well as an outdoor pool, steam room, and fitness center. Guests can enjoy complimentary Wi-Fi, concierge services, and gift shops. Dining options include three restaurants, a coffee shop, two bars/lounges including a poolside bar, and 24-hour room service. Cooked-to-order breakfasts are available daily for a fee. The 123 air-conditioned rooms offer espresso makers, flat-screen televisions, pillowtop beds with down comforters and Egyptian cotton sheets, and private bathrooms with separate bathtubs and showers, designer toiletries, and hair dryers. Additional amenities include express check-in, and complimentary newspapers in the lobby. Los Angeles Intl. (LAX) is the preferred airport.

description1.language: Located in Los Angeles' Beverly Grove, Wilshire Crest Hotel is within walking distance of the Los Angeles County Museum of Art and the Petersen Automotive Museum. The hotel offers complimentary wireless internet access, a communal living room, a vending machine, and a 24-hour front desk. Guests can enjoy a complimentary continental breakfast daily. The hotel features air-conditioned rooms with refrigerators, flat-screen TVs with cable channels, coffee/tea makers, and complimentary toiletries. Bathrooms include shower/tub combinations with hydromassage showerheads. Additional amenities include complimentary newspapers in the lobby, multilingual staff, and daily housekeeping. Dry cleaning service, luggage storage, and safety deposit boxes are available. Select rooms offer blackout curtains. The hotel is near the Academy Museum of Motion Pictures, Los Angeles County Museum of Art, and La Brea Tar Pits. Los Angeles International Airport is the preferred airport.

description1.language: Located in the heart of Los Angeles, the hotel offers 82 air-conditioned rooms featuring refrigerators, complimentary wireless internet access, and cable programming. Rooms also include phones, desks, safes, and bathrooms with bathtubs or showers and hair dryers. Guests can enjoy dining at Enchant LA, a café with a bar/lounge, and a coffee shop/cafe, as well as Woo Mi Gwan, serving Korean cuisine. The hotel provides complimentary newspapers in the lobby, concierge services, wedding services, dry cleaning/laundry services, luggage storage, and a 24-hour front desk. Additional amenities include a banquet hall and a vending machine. Self-parking is available onsite (subject to charges). The hotel is a non-smoking property with designated smoking areas. Services include daily housekeeping, express check-in/check-out, ticket service, and tours.

description1.language: Centrally located in Los Angeles, Courtyard Los Angeles L.A. LIVE is steps from Peacock Theater and a short walk from Crypto.com Arena and the Los Angeles Convention Center. The hotel offers recreational amenities including an outdoor pool and a 24-hour fitness center. Guests can enjoy American cuisine at Cafe Table 901, which features a bar/lounge, or opt for the coffee shop/cafe. To-go breakfasts are available on weekdays from 6 AM to 11:00 AM and on weekends from 6:00 AM to 11:00 AM for a fee. The hotel provides complimentary wireless internet access, wedding services, and a ballroom. Featured amenities include a business center, dry cleaning/laundry services, and a 24-hour front desk. Event planning is facilitated with 3981 square feet of space consisting of conference space and 10 meeting rooms. The 174 guestrooms feature refrigerators, Smart televisions, complimentary wireless internet access, and cable programming. Bathrooms include shower/tub combinations, complimentary toiletries, and hair dryers. Conveniences include laptop-compatible safes, desks, and phones with free local calls.

description1.language: Centrally located in Los Angeles, Holiday Lodge offers 58 air-conditioned guestrooms with flat-screen televisions, complimentary wireless internet access, and cable programming. Private bathrooms include shower/tub combinations, complimentary toiletries, and hair dryers. Conveniences include desks and daily housekeeping. Free self-parking is available onsite. The hotel features a 24-hour front desk, luggage storage, and vending machines. It is within a 5-minute drive of the Los Angeles Convention Center and L.A. Live. Smoking is prohibited. The preferred airport is Los Angeles Intl. (LAX), 31.2 km away.

description1.language: Located in Wilmington, off the 110 Freeway, the hotel offers convenient access to Southern California attractions including the Long Beach Convention Center, Queen Mary, Aquarium of the Pacific, Disneyland®, Universal Studios® Hollywood, and Knott's Berry Farm®. Nearby are Ports o Call Restaurant, 22 St Landing Seafood Grill, and Del Amo Fashion Center. The hotel features 72 air-conditioned rooms equipped with free wireless internet access, cable programming, a private bathroom with shower/tub combination, complimentary toiletries, a hairdryer, a safe, a coffee/tea maker, a refrigerator, and a phone with free long-distance calls. Guests can enjoy an outdoor swimming pool, a hot tub, a complimentary breakfast, complimentary newspapers in the lobby, a banquet hall, a 24-hour business center, express check-out, and free self-parking.

description1.language: Extended Stay America Suites Orange County Anaheim Conv Ctr offers 124 air-conditioned rooms, each with a kitchenette including a refrigerator and stovetop, a 32-inch flat-screen TV with cable, complimentary Wi-Fi, a phone, a desk, and a microwave. A complimentary grab-and-go breakfast (breakfast bars, muffins, hot cereal, coffee, and tea) is served daily from 6 AM to 9:30 AM. Hotel amenities include a year-round outdoor pool, free self-parking, a 24-hour front desk, laundry facilities, a safe deposit box, and discounted access to a nearby fitness center. The hotel is conveniently located near many attractions: Anaheim GardenWalk (0.6 km), House of Blues Anaheim (0.7 km), American Sports Center (1 km), Anaheim Indoor Marketplace (1.1 km), Anaheim Convention Center (1.7 km), Downtown Disney® District (2.1 km), Disney California Adventure® Park (2.2 km), and more. description1.language: Located in central Hawthorne, Ayres Hotel Manhattan Beach LAX offers 173 guestrooms featuring iPod docking stations, flat-screen televisions, and pillowtop beds with down comforters and premium bedding. Dining options consist of room service (limited hours), an on-site restaurant, a cafe, and a bar/lounge; breakfast is available for a fee. The hotel provides concierge services, on-site shopping, a 24-hour business center, and express check-out. Event facilities include a conference center and meeting rooms. Self-parking is available (subject to charges). This European-style hotel also features a lush veranda.

description1.language: The Hilton Garden Inn Los Angeles/Hollywood offers convenient access to Hollywood's iconic attractions, including the Hollywood Walk of Fame, TCL Chinese Theatre, Dolby Theatre, and Hollywood Bowl (all within a 1-mile radius). This hotel provides comfortable accommodations with refrigerators and microwaves, complimentary wired and wireless internet access, Smart TVs with cable programming, and private bathrooms with complimentary toiletries. On-site amenities include an outdoor pool, a fitness center, a 24-hour business center, a TGI Fridays restaurant, a bar/lounge, and a Pavilion Pantry Market. Meeting rooms are available, and valet parking and laundry facilities are offered. Cooked-to-order breakfasts are available daily for a fee. The hotel is approximately 9.6 miles from Hollywood Burbank Airport (BUR), 15 miles from Van Nuys Airport (VNY), and 25 miles from Los Angeles International Airport (LAX).

description1.language: Luxe Sunset Boulevard Hotel in Los Angeles (Brentwood) offers 162 air-conditioned rooms with LCD televisions, complimentary Wi-Fi, private bathrooms with shower/tub combinations, complimentary toiletries, and hair dryers. Many rooms include a private patio, and some offer a separate living room and balcony or terrace. Select rooms feature a refrigerator, coffee/tea maker, and minibar. A complimentary cooked-to-order breakfast is served daily from 7:00 AM to 11:00 AM. On-site amenities include an outdoor pool, a fitness center, a restaurant (Sirocco) specializing in Californian cuisine, a bar/lounge, room service (limited hours), a business center, dry cleaning/laundry services, a 24-hour front desk, a conference center, meeting rooms, wedding services, and a ballroom. Convenient amenities include phones, safes, and desks. The hotel is a short drive from UCLA, the Getty Center, and other attractions. Nearby airports include LAX, VNY, BUR, HHR, and LGB.

description1.language: The Westin Los Angeles Airport offers 747 air-conditioned rooms with LCD televisions and pillowtop beds with premium bedding. Cooked-to-order breakfast is available daily (6 AM-11 AM, fee applies). Two bars/lounges are also available. Amenities include complimentary wireless internet access, gift shops/newsstands, wedding services, a computer station, express check-in/check-out, and a complimentary 24-hour airport shuttle. The hotel features 13,100 square feet (1217 square meters) of event space with 34 meeting rooms. Bathrooms have shower/tub combinations and hair dryers. Nearby attractions include Hollywood Park Casino, Intuit Dome, Toyota Sports Performance Center, SoFi Stadium, Kia Forum, YouTube Theater, Loyola Marymount University, and various beaches. Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) is 2.4 miles away.

description1.language: Located in the heart of Los Angeles, Sheraton Grand Los Angeles offers a rooftop terrace, a garden, and a 24-hour fitness center. Guests can enjoy American cuisine at District on the Bloc, which features a bar/lounge, or visit the coffee shop/cafe. Full breakfasts are available daily from 7:00 AM to 10:00 AM for a fee. The hotel provides complimentary wireless internet access, concierge services, gift shops/newsstands, a 24-hour business center, limo/town car service, and express check-in. For events, there is conference space and 9 meeting rooms. The hotel features guestrooms with LCD televisions, pillowtop beds with down comforters, and 47-inch Smart televisions with cable programming. Wireless internet access is available (surcharge). Private bathrooms offer shower/tub combinations, deep soaking bathtubs, and complimentary toiletries. Nearby attractions include The Bloc, Pershing Square, and L.A. Live. The preferred airport is Los Angeles Intl. (LAX).

description2.language: THE SHERATON GRAND LOS ANGELES(FORMERLY SHERATON LOS ANGELES DOWNTOWN) is a Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

description1.language: Kimpton Everly Hotel Hollywood by IHG offers 216 guest rooms with iPod docking stations, minibars, pillowtop beds with Frette Italian sheets, and private bathrooms featuring designer toiletries and hair dryers. Enjoy complimentary Wi-Fi, a 24-hour fitness center, and a year-round outdoor pool. The hotel provides a 24-hour reception, concierge services, babysitting (surcharge), dry cleaning/laundry services, and 4 meeting rooms. On-site amenities include Jane Q restaurant serving American cuisine, a coffee shop/cafe, a bar/lounge, and a poolside bar. A complimentary daily wine hour (5 PM-6 PM) and local cuisine breakfast (7:30 AM-11:30 AM, surcharge) are available. Parking is available. The hotel is wheelchair accessible. It's centrally located, steps from the Hollywood Walk of Fame and within a 5-minute walk of the Pantages Theatre. Nearby attractions include Capitol Records Tower, ArcLight Theater Hollywood, Hollywood Palladium, and many more (distances provided in description). The preferred airport is Los Angeles International Airport (LAX).

description1.language: Located in the heart of Beverly Hills, The Peninsula Beverly Hills offers a luxurious experience near Rodeo Drive and Century City. This hotel features elegant guest rooms with Italian marble bathrooms, some with separate showers. Rooms include complimentary wired and wireless internet access, LCD televisions, pillowtop beds with down comforters and Frette Italian sheets, and a minibar. Guests can enjoy a rooftop lap pool with private cabanas, a full-service spa and health club, and multiple on-site dining options including The Belvedere restaurant. Amenities include 24-hour room service and concierge, a business center, designer boutiques, a poolside bar, and complimentary area shuttle service within 3 miles. The hotel provides a conference center and meeting rooms, limo/town car service, and airport shuttle service for a surcharge. Additional services include laundry/dry cleaning, and shoe shining. Guests have access to a fitness center, hot tub, and sauna.

description2.language: The Peninsula Beverly Hills is a Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are easily accessible by taxi or bus from the hotel.

roomType.roomDescription: This 560-sq-foot soundproofed room features a king bed with pillowtop mattress, Frette Italian linens, a down duvet, and blackout drapes. A separate sitting area complements the furnished patio with garden views. Entertainment options include a 42-inch LCD TV with premium channels and streaming services, plus a tablet computer. The room also offers free WiFi and wired internet, a refrigerator, minibar (fees may apply), microwave, and 24-hour room service. The private bathroom includes a deep soaking bathtub and separate shower. Additional amenities include climate-controlled air conditioning, a safe, free newspaper, iron/ironing board, and daily housekeeping. In-room massage is available. Eco-friendly cleaning supplies are used. Accessible features include a visual fire alarm. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability. Non-smoking.

description1.language: Howard Johnson by Wyndham Pasadena is centrally located in Pasadena, offering complimentary Wi-Fi and a daily on-the-go breakfast from 7 AM to 10:00 AM. The hotel features an outdoor pool (closed seasonally from June 01 to December 31), a business center, and a vending machine. Guests can enjoy recreational opportunities and take advantage of express check-out and complimentary newspapers in the lobby. Event facilities include conference space and meeting rooms. The 59 air-conditioned rooms offer refrigerators, LED televisions with satellite programming, phones, desks, microwaves, and private bathrooms with shower/tub combinations, complimentary toiletries, and hair dryers. Limited parking is available onsite. The hotel is a short drive from the California Institute of Technology, Pasadena Convention Center, and Rose Bowl Stadium. Hollywood Burbank Airport is the preferred airport.

description2.language: The Howard Johnson by Wyndham Pasadena is a Tourist hotel. Located in PASADENA area. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

A refrigerator, microwave, and coffee/tea maker are included. The private bathroom offers a shower/tub combination, free toiletries, and a hair dryer. Additional amenities include blackout drapes/curtains, air conditioning, heating, a desk, phone, and iron/ironing board. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Wheelchair accessible; non-smoking. Room is accessed via exterior corridors. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability.

description1.language:
The hotel is located in La Puente, United States of America. 10 km away from Statue of Liberty Replica, 18 km away from Garvey Park, 35 km away from Old Pasadena and 56 km away from Los Angeles International Airport.

Facilities and services included 24-hour reception, air conditioning, wireless internet, parking, elevator, laundry (extra charge), daily housekeeping, meeting room, business center, express check-in/check-out, fitness center, wheelchair access and multilingual staff.

Room features include air conditioning, heating, wireless internet, television, telephone, tea/coffee maker, desk, fridge, microwave, towels, hairdryer and private bathroom.

Address: 753 Glendora Ave, La Puente, CA 91744, United States.

description1.language: Hyatt Place Pasadena features 189 guestrooms with complimentary Wi-Fi, flat-screen televisions, refrigerators, laptop-compatible safes, desks, and daily housekeeping. Bathrooms include complimentary toiletries and hair dryers. The hotel offers a restaurant, snack bar/deli, and a bar/lounge. Guests can enjoy recreation opportunities such as an outdoor pool and a 24-hour fitness center. Additional amenities include a 24-hour business center, 24-hour front desk, a safe deposit box at the front desk, a banquet hall, and parking (subject to charges). Buffet breakfasts are served on weekdays from 6:30 AM to 10:00 AM and on weekends from 7:00 AM to 10:00 AM for a fee. The hotel is eco-certified and provides wheelchair accessibility. It is centrally located in Pasadena, close to the Pasadena Convention Center. The preferred airport is Los Angeles Intl. (LAX).

description1.language: Located off Highway 101 in downtown Los Angeles, Super 8 by Wyndham offers convenient access to area attractions. Dodger Stadium is within walking distance. Other nearby attractions include Walt Disney Concert Hall, Echo Park Lake, and L.A. Live. The hotel features a 24-hour front desk, express check-in/check-out, designated smoking areas, and paid self-parking. Guests can enjoy a complimentary on-the-go breakfast and free WiFi. Each air-conditioned room includes a refrigerator, microwave, cable TV, a desk, complimentary toiletries, a hair dryer, and a phone with free local calls. Accessible and non-smoking rooms are available.

Guests can enjoy complimentary Wi-Fi, a seasonal outdoor pool, and a daily on-the-go breakfast from 6:30 AM to 9:30 AM. The hotel provides a 24-hour front desk, luggage storage, ATM/banking services, and free self-parking. Air-conditioned rooms feature LED televisions with cable programming, safes, desks, phones with free local calls, a refrigerator, a microwave, and a coffee maker. The hotel is located within a short drive of Venice Beach, Sony Pictures Studios, and Los Angeles International Airport (LAX).

description1.language: The Days Inn by Wyndham Los Angeles LAX/VeniceBch/Marina DelRay offers comfortable accommodations near Los Angeles International Airport (LAX), with convenient access to the San Diego Freeway (I-405). The Kia Forum and SoFi Stadium are within a 5-minute drive. The hotel features complimentary wireless internet access, a 24-hour front desk, multilingual staff, and luggage storage. Guests can enjoy a complimentary on-the-go breakfast served daily from 7:00 AM to 9:00 AM and take advantage of the outdoor pool. Each of the 47 air-conditioned rooms includes a refrigerator, microwave, coffee maker, cable TV with premium channels, a safe, a desk, and complimentary toiletries. A complimentary airport shuttle to and from LAX is available between 6:00 AM and 11:30 PM (guests should call the hotel to request shuttle service). Self-parking is available onsite (subject to charges).

description1.language: Located in Los Angeles (Beverly Grove), this luxury hotel is minutes from Rodeo Drive, Beverly Hills. It offers individually decorated guestrooms featuring pillowtop beds, Smart TVs, DVD players, and private bathrooms with designer toiletries. Wireless internet access is available (surcharge). Guests can enjoy two restaurants, a coffee shop/cafe, a bar/lounge, and a poolside bar. Room service is available (during limited hours). The hotel features an outdoor pool, a 24-hour fitness center, and a spa offering luxury treatments. Amenities include complimentary wireless internet access in public areas, concierge services, a complimentary shuttle (within 2 mi), a 24-hour business center, and limo/town car service. The hotel provides 4300 square feet of event space with 12 meeting rooms. Nearby attractions include L.A. Contemporary Museum of Art (LACMA), Petersen Automotive Museum, and the Academy Museum of Motion Pictures.

description1.language: Located in Los Angeles, Century Park Hotel LA offers air-conditioned rooms with complimentary Wi-Fi, a desk, a coffee machine, a refrigerator, a microwave, and a safety deposit box. Each of the 47 individually decorated guestrooms features a 55-inch LED television with digital programming and a private bathroom with a bathtub or shower, rainfall showerhead, and designer toiletries. Beds are fitted with down comforters and Frette Italian sheets. The hotel provides a 24-hour front desk, concierge services, express check-out, and dry cleaning/laundry services. A vending machine is available. Private parking is available on site. The hotel is a smoke-free property and is closed seasonally from April 01 to May 31.

description1.language: Located on a palm-lined boulevard in Beverly Hills, L'Ermitage Beverly Hills is an all-suite hotel committed to providing excellence in hospitality. The hotel offers suites with spacious layouts and modern appointments. Suites feature walk-through dressing rooms, full-length triptych mirrors, and vanities. The hotel features Costa Covo Osteria, serving Italian cuisine, and multiple bars/lounges. Guests can relax at The Canopy, a rooftop retreat with a poolside sundeck and private cabanas. The hotel spa offers massages, body treatments, and facials. Other amenities include complimentary wireless internet access, concierge services, wedding services, a fitness center, and a 24-hour business center. The hotel provides accessible parking options. Room service is available. Each accommodation offers a comfortable atmosphere, with select rooms featuring a balcony or terrace. Televisions with cable programming are available in rooms. Bathrooms feature separate bathtubs and showers, complimentary toiletries, and hair dryers. The hotel is a smoke-free zone. The hotel is undergoing renovations to the lobby, restaurant, pool &amp; exterior from March to September 2024.

description2.language: The L’Ermitage Beverly Hills is a Boutique, Eco Friendly, Full Service, Pet Friendly, Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are easily accessible by taxi or bus from the hotel.

roomType.roomDescription: This 675-sq-foot, individually decorated, non-smoking room features a balcony and a separate sitting area. It offers a king bed with a pillowtop mattress, Egyptian cotton linens, a down duvet, a pillow menu, and blackout drapes/curtains. Guests can enjoy a 55-inch Smart TV with premium channels and pay movies, free WiFi and wired internet access, an iPod dock, a coffee/tea maker, and 24-hour room service (minibar fees may apply). The private bathroom includes a separate bathtub and shower, bathrobes, and slippers. Additional amenities include climate-controlled air conditioning, a safe, free newspaper, an iron/ironing board, daily housekeeping, and braille signage. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. In-room massages are available. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability.

Guests can enjoy free WiFi and wired internet access, a 55-inch Smart TV with premium channels and pay movies, and an iPod dock. The room also includes a kitchen with a refrigerator, stovetop, microwave, and dishwasher. The private bathroom has a separate bathtub and shower, bathrobes, and slippers. Additional amenities include a fireplace, climate-controlled air conditioning, a safe, free newspaper, iron/ironing board, and daily housekeeping. In-room massages are available. Accessibility features include Braille signage. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability.

description1.language: Moxy Downtown Los Angeles offers 380 air-conditioned guest rooms with LED TVs, complimentary Wi-Fi, cable programming, in-room safes, desks, and private bathrooms including showers, hair dryers, and toothbrushes/toothpaste. Enjoy an outdoor pool, rooftop terrace, garden, 24-hour fitness center, and a nightclub. On-site amenities include a coffee shop/cafe, multiple bars/lounges (at least two), a 24-hour business center, express check-in/check-out, a vending machine, and event space totaling 9,716 square feet (903 square meters) with conference areas and six meeting rooms. To-go breakfast is available daily for a fee (6:30 AM - 1:00 PM). Located near Crypto.com Arena and the Los Angeles Convention Center, the hotel is also within close proximity to L.A. Live and the Peacock Theater. Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) is the preferred airport.

description2.language: The Moxy Downtown Los Angeles is a hotel.

description1.language: Located in Hollywood, Super 8 by Wyndham Hollywood/LA Area offers air-conditioned rooms with complimentary wireless internet access, cable programming, refrigerators, desks, and coffee/tea makers. Bathrooms include shower/tub combinations and hair dryers. A complimentary continental breakfast is served daily from 7:00 AM to 9:30 AM. The hotel features a 24-hour front desk, an elevator, and coffee/tea in a common area. Free self-parking is available onsite. Hollywood Boulevard is a 3-minute walk away, while the Hollywood Walk of Fame is within a 5-minute drive.

description2.language: The Super 8 By Wyndham Hollywood/LA Area is a Tourist hotel. Located in Hollywood area. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

description1.language:
Located in Los Angeles, Royal Palace Westwood offers convenient amenities including complimentary wireless internet access, concierge services, and discounted access to a nearby fitness facility. Guests can enjoy a complimentary continental breakfast. Featured amenities include a 24-hour business center, express check-out, and complimentary newspapers in the lobby. Free self-parking is available onsite. The hotel is entirely smoke-free, with designated smoking areas. Guests can utilize the car hire amenities. Front desk services include concierge service, express check-in or check-out, luggage storage and safety deposit boxes. Laundry service is available. Snack vending machines are available.

The 36 air-conditioned rooms feature refrigerators, LCD televisions with cable programming, and pillowtop beds. Private bathrooms offer shower/tub combinations, complimentary toiletries, and hair dryers. Select rooms include linen service, blackout curtains, a balcony or terrace. In-room amenities include room service and daily housekeeping.

description2.language: The Royal Palace Westwood is a hotel. Located in Los Angeles area.

The room also provides a refrigerator, microwave, coffee/tea maker, safe, iron/ironing board, and free weekday newspaper. The private bathroom includes a shower/tub combination, free toiletries, and a hair dryer. For your comfort, the room is equipped with air conditioning and offers daily housekeeping. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Additional amenities include closed-captioned TV and LED light bulbs.

Guests can enjoy the convenience of a refrigerator, microwave, coffee/tea maker, safe, iron/ironing board, and free weekday newspaper. The private bathroom offers a shower/tub combination, free toiletries, and a hair dryer. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Conveniences include a refrigerator, microwave, coffee/tea maker, safe, iron/ironing board, free weekday newspaper, and daily housekeeping. It includes a private bathroom with a shower/tub combination, free toiletries, and a hair dryer. For convenience, there is a refrigerator, microwave, coffee/tea maker, safe, iron/ironing board, and free weekday newspaper. Comfort is ensured with air conditioning, blackout drapes/curtains, and daily housekeeping. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Additional amenities include a pillowtop bed, bed sheets, closed-captioned TV, and LED light bulbs.

description1.language: Centrally located in Los Angeles, the Hollywood Historic Hotel offers 62 air-conditioned rooms featuring refrigerators, flat-screen televisions, pillowtop beds with premium bedding, complimentary wireless internet access, cable programming, and private bathrooms with showers, complimentary toiletries, and hair dryers. Guests can enjoy a meal at the restaurant, snacks in the coffee shop/cafe, or a drink at the bar/lounge. To-go breakfasts are available daily from 7:00 AM to 1:00 PM for a fee. The hotel provides complimentary wireless internet access, concierge services, a 24-hour front desk, luggage storage, dry cleaning/laundry services, and a safe deposit box at the front desk. Self parking is available onsite (charges apply). Built in 1927, this historic hotel is near Paramount Studios.

description2.language: The Hollywood Historic Hotel is a hotel.

roomType.roomDescription: This 160-sq-foot, non-smoking room offers city views, free WiFi, and a 32-inch flat-screen TV with premium channels. It features a queen bed with pillowtop mattress, premium bedding, and blackout drapes/curtains. A private bathroom includes a shower/tub combination, free toiletries, and a hair dryer. Additional amenities include a refrigerator, free bottled water, a safe, desk, iron/ironing board, air conditioning, and daily housekeeping. The room also has high pile carpet.

description1.language: La Quinta Inn &amp; Suites by Wyndham San Bernardino (formerly Super 8 San Bernardino/Hospitality Lane) is located in San Bernardino, near the Orange Show, San Bernardino Golf Club, National Orange Show Events Center, and Fiesta Village Family Fun Park. It offers free WiFi, air-conditioned rooms, complimentary continental breakfast, an indoor pool, a 24-hour front desk, a business center, a 24-hour fitness center, a snack bar/deli, an elevator, and a shared lounge. Free self-parking is available. Rooms feature refrigerators, LCD televisions with cable programming, complimentary toiletries, hair dryers, desks, and microwaves. Housekeeping is provided on request. The hotel is close to San Bernardino International Airport (SBD) and Los Angeles - Ontario International Airport (ONT), with ONT being the preferred airport.

description2.language: The La Quinta Inn & Suites by Wyndham San Bernardino is a Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

description1.language: Located in Beverly Hills, The Beverly Hills Hotel features Art Deco elegance and a full-service spa offering massages, body treatments, and facials. Guests can enjoy an outdoor pool with underwater music, a spa tub, a sauna, and a 24-hour fitness center. Complimentary Wi-Fi is available, along with concierge services and free babysitting. Dining options include The Polo Lounge serving American cuisine, a coffee shop/cafe, and a poolside bar, with 24-hour room service available. A full breakfast is offered daily for a fee. The hotel provides a 24-hour business center and limo service. The 208 individually decorated guestrooms feature MP3 docking stations, plasma televisions with satellite programming and DVD players, private bathrooms with separate bathtubs and showers, complimentary toiletries, safes, and desks. Nearby attractions include Rodeo Drive, Roxy Theatre, and Westfield Century City. The hotel is across from Will Rogers Memorial Park and a short distance from Greystone Mansion.

description1.language: Located in Hollywood, Hampton Inn &amp; Suites Los Angeles/Hollywood offers convenient access to attractions and businesses. Nearby points of interest include the Hollywood Walk of Fame and Pantages Theatre. The hotel features modern interior design, rooms with free WiFi, a microwave, and a mini-refrigerator. Guests can enjoy a complimentary buffet breakfast. Amenities include an outdoor heated pool, a fitness center (with reduced service), a business center, and a 24-hour convenience store. The hotel also offers meeting space and catering options. Each air-conditioned room includes a flat-screen TV with cable channels, a work desk, a laptop-compatible safe, and a private bathroom with complimentary toiletries and a hairdryer. Breakfast service is currently reduced and Valet Parking is not available.

description2.language: The Hampton Inn & Suites Los Angeles/Hollywood is a hotel. Located in Hollywood area.

description1.language: Located in Porter Ranch, near SR 118, Hampton Inn &amp; Suites Porter Ranch Los Angeles offers air-conditioned rooms with a desk, flat-screen TV, and free toiletries. Guests can enjoy complimentary wireless internet access, a 24-hour fitness center, a 24-hour business center, and a complimentary buffet breakfast on weekdays from 6:00 AM to 10:00 AM. The hotel features an outdoor pool and a 24-hour front desk. Free self-parking is available. Hollywood Burbank Airport is nearby. Daily Mandatory Charge includes: California Tourism Assessment Fee.

description1.language: Palihotel Westwood Village is located in Los Angeles (Westwood), a 5-minute walk from the Hammer Museum and UCLA. Rodeo Drive is 2.7 miles away, and the Getty Center is 3.7 miles away. Amenities include complimentary Wi-Fi, concierge services, dry cleaning/laundry services, a 24-hour front desk, and multilingual staff. Guest rooms feature flat-screen televisions, pillowtop beds with premium bedding, private bathrooms with rainfall showerheads and complimentary toiletries, and minibars. A complimentary continental breakfast is served daily. The hotel also has a garden. Nearby attractions include Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, Westfield Century City, 20th Century Fox Studios, and more (see detailed list of distances in original descriptions). Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) is the preferred airport.

roomType.name: ROOM, KING BED
roomType.roomDescription: This 180-200 square foot guestroom features a 43-inch wall-mounted TV, a fully stocked mini-bar, a small refrigerator, an en-suite safety deposit box, and a rain shower. Custom furniture and artwork are included.

roomType.name: Deluxe, King Bed
roomType.roomDescription: This 260 sq ft guestroom features a king bed, a bay window overlooking the interior garden, and a 43-inch flat-screen TV. Amenities include a fully stocked minibar (fees may apply), refrigerator, electric kettle, and free WiFi. The en-suite bathroom offers a rainfall shower, bathrobes, and a safety deposit box. Air conditioning is provided. A laptop workspace is available, and an iron/ironing board is available upon request. No cribs or extra beds are available. Pet-friendly and non-smoking.

roomType.name: DELUXE, KING BED, GARDEN VIEW
roomType.roomDescription: This pet-friendly, non-smoking room features a king-size pillowtop bed with premium bedding, a private bathroom with bathrobes and a rainfall showerhead, and a flat-screen TV. Amenities include free WiFi, a refrigerator, minibar (fees may apply), and an electric kettle. A safe, laptop workspace, and air conditioning are also provided. An iron and ironing board are available upon request. Housekeeping is available on request. Cribs and extra beds are not available.

roomType.name: ROOM, KING BED, GARDEN VIEW
roomType.roomDescription: This guest room overlooks the interior garden and features a 43-inch wall-mounted TV, a fully stocked mini-bar, a small refrigerator, an en-suite safety deposit box, and a rain shower. Custom furniture and artwork are included.
